evidence_summary: Establish the new mission and scale of the upcoming conflict.
Now a chieftain, John Carter proposes an ambitious raid on Zodanga to rescue Dejah Thoris. The Thark hordes enthusiastically commit to the cause, amassing a massive army of 150,000 warriors.
Wide shots of the gathering masses
Medium shots of Carter delivering his proposal
